The race condition is high (data integrity). Focus trap is high (accessibility violation). Swipe conflict is high (mobile UX broken). The timer leak is medium. Image error handling is medium. For the persona "Information Density Reviewer", I should also mention the information density issues: - The hardcoded slice limits (0:6, 0:3, 0:8) reduce density without user control - The KPI grid only shows 3 metrics when there's room for more on desktop - The search results show only 12 per page with no option to increase density But these are more suggestions than objections. objections.description: Hardcoded date range locks all searches to year 2002 (dateFrom: '2002-01-01', dateTo: '2002-12-31'), rendering the search functionality useless for current documents.
objections.suggested_fix: Remove hardcoded dates or wire to date picker state.

objections.description: Race condition in search pagination: `resultState.results` is accessed from closure stale state when appending, causing potential data loss or duplication if user rapidly clicks 'Carregar mais'.
objections.suggested_fix: Use functional state update: `setResultState(prev => ({...prev, results: append ? [...prev.results, ...payload.results] : payload.results}))`

objections.description: BottomSheet component lacks focus trap. When opened, focus is not constrained to the sheet, allowing keyboard users to tab behind the modal backdrop.
objections.suggested_fix: Implement focus trap using refs and tabindex management, or use native <dialog> element with proper polyfill.

objections.description: Touch swipe gesture on ResultRow conflicts with vertical scrolling. The touch event handlers on the article element intercept scroll attempts on mobile, causing UX dead zones or accidental swipe triggers.
objections.suggested_fix: Add threshold logic to distinguish horizontal swipes from vertical scrolls, or use CSS scroll-snap instead of JS touch handlers.

objections.description: Long press timer leak in ResultRow: `pressTimer` is not cleared if component unmounts during the 350ms timeout, causing setState on unmounted component.
objections.suggested_fix: Add useEffect cleanup to clear pressTimer.current on unmount.

objections.description: Images in media-strip lack error handling and srcset. If blob_url fails to load, broken image icons break the layout without fallback.
objections.suggested_fix: Add onError handler to show placeholder, and implement srcset for responsive images.

objections.description: Status banners lack aria-live regions. Screen readers do not announce connectivity changes or flash messages dynamically injected into the DOM.
objections.suggested_fix: Add aria-live='polite' and aria-atomic='true' to status-banner and flash-banner containers.

objections.description: Silent failure on type filter load: `fetchTypes` errors are caught and ignored, leaving the type dropdown empty without user feedback.
objections.suggested_fix: Surface the error to the UI or retry mechanism instead of empty catch block.

suggestions.description: Search input lacks a clear button (X) for quickly resetting the query, forcing users to manually delete text.
Suggestion list lacks scroll-into-view behavior. When navigating long autocomplete lists via keyboard, active items can be hidden outside the viewport.
